name: Pure Fruit Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Uncooked oat bran for creamy-style hot cereal
1 1/2 c Mixed dried fruits such as raisins, apricots or dates (coarsely chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease two large baking sheets.
3. Mix mashed bananas, oil, vanilla, egg and salt until well blended.
4. Add remaining ingredients and stir well.
5. Drop by tablespoons onto the prepared baking sheets about 1 inch apart.
6. Flatten slightly.
7. Bake for about 20 minutes, or until bottom edges are lightly browned.
8. Cool completely and store in the refrigerator.
